docs.title: Home
docs.text:
Welcome to the NovaTrek Adventures Architecture Portal — the single source of truth for architectural decisions, service documentation, design standards, and operational knowledge across all NovaTrek engineering domains.

About This Portal

This portal represents the proposed future state of the NovaTrek Architecture Practice's knowledge base. Content is being populated incrementally as the Continuous Architecture Platform matures through its phased rollout.

Current phase: Phase 1 — AI Tool Cost Comparison

docs.title: Service Catalog
docs.text: Inventory of all NovaTrek microservices with ownership, API contracts, dependencies, and health status.

docs.title: Architecture Decisions
docs.text: MADR-formatted decision records tracking every significant architectural choice and its rationale.

docs.title: Design Standards
docs.text: arc42 templates, C4 model guidelines, quality attributes, and naming conventions for consistent architecture documentation.

docs.title: Solution Designs
docs.text: Active and completed solution designs for in-flight work items, organized by ticket.

docs.title: Roadmap
docs.text: Phased delivery plan for the Continuous Architecture Platform and NovaTrek engineering initiatives.

docs.title: Quality & Compliance
docs.text: ISO 25010 quality model, safety classification rules, and compliance requirements for adventure operations.

docs.title: Tags
docs.text: This page lists all tagged content across the Architecture Portal.
